task_completion.description: Verify the new department was created correctly.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the job title 'VP of Product' with the code 'VP-PROD' in the Sentrifugo Job Titles list or a creation success screen.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the job title 'Senior Product Manager' with the code 'SR-PM' in the Sentrifugo Job Titles list or a creation success screen.

task_completion.description: Verify Lucas Fernandez was added as an employee with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Lucas Fernandez' with Employee ID 'EMP023' assigned to the 'Product Manager' title in the Sentrifugo Employees list or user profile screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Sentrifugo web application UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Sentrifugo web interface in a browser to add the department, titles, and employees, rather than using an API or database script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent read the department charter file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening '~/Desktop/department_charter.txt' in a text editor or using a terminal command (like cat or less) to read its contents.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out the forms in Sentrifugo.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing into the Sentrifugo form fields (e.g., Department Name, Job Title, Employee Details) and clicking save/submit buttons.
